entry.title: Your Heartbeat Keeps Me Sane
entry.summary:
Author: CoraParker222

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,753Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Stiles is bitten by Peter and wakes up in the hospital. He's not a werewolf, a Kanima, a Banshee, or a human; so what is he? There's also the thing where Stiles and Derek are Mates...   More tags will be added as the story progresses.

entry.title: The Wrong Man in First Class
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,402Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Slutty flight attendant Stiles spots hot, Rolex-wearing Derek in first class and assumes rich jackpot. She turns full whore: short skirt hikes, tits in his face, turbulence dry-hump orgasm, begs raw cock in hotel. Sweet office worker Derek (sent instead of CEO) gets wrecked, falls hard for her greedy pussy. Truth hits: he’s just a salaryman. Stiles tries to bolt—“No money, no me.” Derek snaps—rips her dress, pins her down, fucks her raw and rough: slaps her ass red, chokes her, breeds her deep while growling, “You chased cash, but this ‘poor’ cock owns your cunt now.” She breaks—cums screaming, begs to stay. No more rich fantasies. Just his thick dick owning her forever.

entry.title: carry that weight
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,687Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 57

Summary: “I swear I’m fine, it’s just a stomach bug, I told you,” Stiles mumbles, eyes falling closed again. He could really do with a nap, but this damn pillow— After a moment he hears gentle clicking across the loft’s floor. Derek’s claws are pattering across the ground, and it sounds so cute that Stiles can’t even be annoyed by the excess noise.  Derek whines again, nudging Stiles with his nose when he’s back in his orbit, and Stiles begrudgingly opens his heavy eyes to a sight that makes his heart clench. It’s Derek, still in wolf form, standing before him with earnest puppy dog eyes, clutching Stiles’ pillow in his mouth.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Parking Lot Diplomacy
entry.summary:
Author: simplyn2deep

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: Derek and Stiles keep meeting in parking lots in the middle of the night to argue about things that absolutely do matter, no matter what either of them says. Somewhere between the insults, the worry, and the waiting, one of them realizes that maybe they do not have the rest of it figured out. But they have this.

entry.title: Just Kids, Once
entry.summary:
Author: hubrys

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 147,358Chapters: 13/15Kudos: 259

Summary: “To finding someone who makes you more yourself, not less. To choosing, not because it’s expected, but because it’s what you want.” ________   They grew up clinging to each other in a house that promised nothing. Years later, Stiles dances in a cage and Derek’s about to get married. Some stories don’t start with love. Some start when everything else has already fallen apart.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,134Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: Just Trust Me, You'll Be Fine
entry.summary:
Author: PigeonTheSmol

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,802Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 293

Summary: The events of Season 1 of The Pitt go the same as they do in the show, but when Dennis gets to Trinity's place there's an additional roommate. Stiles and Dennis become fast friends but both are hiding secrets about why they keep avoiding talking about home. One day a man comes into The Pitt with a bullet lodged into his side and when they check his emergency contact, it's Stiles. But what's more concerning to Dennis is that he recognises the bullet. (Title and some chapter titles taken from End of Beginning by Djo and other songs that I'll credit in each chapter)

entry.title: The Road to Sacramento
entry.summary:
Author: hyacinth_fiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,190Chapters: 22/25Kudos: 77

Summary: The universe has a wonderful sense of timing and Stiles and co. are thrown into all kinds of antics when the world goes to hell in a handbasket. Join them as they journey away from the security of their old lives and towards the hope of a new safety. Do they make it? I suppose you'll have to read on to find out. This story is going to be slow burn, like that languid yearning we all know and love seasoned with well-ripened apocalypse angst. There will be spice in this tale, eventually. Solid trigger warning for canon-typical blood/violence, casual swearing, and some other bits I'll stick in the notes of the relevant chapters

entry.title: be with you
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 777Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: It seems my light's been swallowed up / I've used up every ounce of luck / I need to leap into the fire / Find a higher power / And reach for something new Derek wishes he could go back in time, give his life in return for his family’s. Not a day goes by that he doesn’t think of them, regret what he did. Sometimes it seems there’s nothing left for him, that his future was enveloped in flames as well that day, that nothing will ever go right for him again. Because he doesn’t deserve for it to.But then — I need somewhere that's safe to run / It can't just be with anyone / It's got to be with you / It's got to be with you Stiles.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,223Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 18

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,044,652Chapters: 54/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,426Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 11

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of whatever creature first greets Stiles at his front gate in exchange for Stiles' freedom. entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,522Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,298Chapters: 40/42Kudos: 132

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.
